title: Love Drug Previntive Protocol
author: Alelaimat, Abdul Kareem
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Course Description:  
 This training program provides a comprehensive understanding of the preventive medical protocol based on ethical, non-clinical, and evidence-based approaches. It focuses on the scientific, physiological, and moral foundations of preventive medicine and its application to humans, animals, plants, microorganisms, and all living systems. Participants will learn to design, analyze, and apply preventive interventions using data simulation, modeling, and molecular-physiological studies — without direct clinical experimentation on patients.
